text:
(In reply to w.schwarzenfeld from comment #3)
Right action, wrong reason (passage of time).  ;)

gettext-runtime has been added to security/heimdal/Makefile.  Thank-you.

BTW: I'm running heimdal 7.5.0 - simply changed the PORTVERSION and distinfo :)
